sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105274" key="tri/staqmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-σταθμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105274.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice the weight,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:96" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">96</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
